## Summary

Describe the profile proposal or revision.

## Affected Profile

- [ ] P1
- [ ] P2
- [ ] P3
- [ ] P4
- [ ] P5
- [ ] New profile proposal

## Problem Statement

What gap, ambiguity, or use case does this address?

## Proposed Profile Logic

Describe:

- the intended scope
- allowed uses
- restricted uses
- prohibited uses
- disclosure expectations
- expected use cases

## Why a Profile Change Is Needed

Explain why this should be represented as a profile-level distinction rather than only repository guidance.

## Impact on Other Materials

Check all that may need updates.

- [ ] `OHAS_STANDARD.md`
- [ ] `profiles/`
- [ ] `README.md`
- [ ] `audit/`
- [ ] `docs/`
- [ ] `examples/`
- [ ] `schemas/`

## Additional Context

Add any supporting examples or rationale here.
